summary: Completed frontend testing for iteration 181: Bundle modal, cross-sell dialog, unified service flow, and mobile responsiveness. All features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 181 features verified working: 1) Bundle modal opens on Fresh Meals page with X close button, image, description, price, and 'Add to Cart' button, 2) Cross-sell dialog has X button and proper positioning with max-height and overflow, 3) Product cards on Fresh Meals page are clickable and show ProductDetailModal, 4) Unified service flow: meal inquiry creates ticket in service desk (tested via API), 5) Mobile view: products and bundles are clickable and modals work correctly.

features_tested.bundle_modal_desktop: PASS - Opens with X button, image, description, price (₹2,499), and 'Add to Cart' button
features_tested.bundle_modal_mobile: PASS - Opens correctly on mobile viewport (390x844)
features_tested.product_cards_clickable_desktop: PASS - 24 product cards found, clicking opens ProductDetailModal with X close button
features_tested.product_cards_clickable_mobile: PASS - Products clickable on mobile, modal opens correctly
features_tested.cross_sell_dialog: PASS - Has X button (line 620-626), max-height with overflow-y-auto, proper positioning
features_tested.service_catalog_section: PASS - 6 service cards displayed, price modal opens with X button
features_tested.meal_inquiry_modal: PASS - Form opens with name, phone, email, pet name, diet preference, and submit button

api_tests.POST /api/service-requests: PASS - Returns success with ticket_id (TKT-59911BCC) and request_id (REQ-20260202-8265)

ui_tests.fresh_meals_page_load: PASS - Hero section, categories, benefits, products section all visible
ui_tests.meal_plan_bundles_section: PASS - 5 bundles displayed with 'View Bundle' buttons
ui_tests.bundle_detail_modal: PASS - Shows image, description, price, original price (strikethrough), 'Add to Cart' button
ui_tests.product_detail_modal: PASS - Opens on product card click, shows product info, NPS score, testimonials
ui_tests.price_calculator_modal: PASS - City selection, pet size, pet count, add-ons, calculated price
ui_tests.inquiry_modal: PASS - Form fields for name, phone, email, pet name, diet preference, notes
ui_tests.mobile_responsiveness: PASS - 2-column grid for products, modals work on mobile
